## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Other

## Main workflow impact

Which part of the OmniFinance workflow does this change support?

- [ ] Financial profile
- [ ] Health diagnosis
- [ ] Opportunity detection
- [ ] Scenario or stress testing
- [ ] Action plan
- [ ] Report export or review loop
- [ ] General engineering maintenance

## Testing

Please check the items that apply:

- [ ] `python -m compileall app.py home.py pages core tests`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy core --ignore-missing-imports`

## Assumptions and limitations

List any important model assumptions, data assumptions, or known limitations.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes when useful.

## Checklist

- [ ] Core logic is separated from Streamlit UI where practical.
- [ ] New or changed core logic has tests.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] The change avoids overstating what the model or calculation can do.
